title: Find the other solution for cos $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{4}$$
text: Determine the other value of $$x$$ in $$(0$$, $$2\pi)$$ for which cos $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{4}$$.
